meta.title: About Bubld Wash | Empowering Freelance Car Wash Professionals
meta.description: Learn our story. We connect independent car wash professionals with customers who need reliable, professional service.

hero.title: Building a better platform for freelance washers
hero.subtitle: At Bubld Wash, we believe independent professionals deserve tools that support their success, flexibility, and financial growth.

items.title: The Beginning
items.body: Bubld Wash was founded by independent car wash professionals who frustrated with complicated platforms and unfair fees. We decided to build the platform we wanted to use—transparent, fair, and focused on our success.

items.title: Our Mission
items.body: Today, we're proud to support hundreds of freelance washers across major metro areas. Every feature we build, every decision we make, is guided by a single question: How does this help our washers earn more and work less?

items.title: What Sets Us Apart
items.body: No hidden fees. No long-term contracts. Just straightforward rates, real job matching, and payouts delivered within 24 hours. We treat our washers like partners, not contractors.

items.title: Our Mission
items.body: Empower independent car wash professionals with the technology, opportunities, and support they need to build thriving, sustainable businesses.

items.title: Our Vision
items.body: A future where freelance washers have choice, control, and genuine partnership in platforms they work with.

items.title: Transparency
items.body: No surprises. Clear fees, honest communication, real-time tracking.

items.title: Fair Pay
items.body: Competitive rates that respect your time and skill.

items.title: Flexibility
items.body: Work your way. Choose jobs, set your schedule, build your business.

items.title: Trust
items.body: We're partners in your success, not obstacles to it.

items.title: Community
items.body: Support, resources, and connections with other professional washers.

items.title: Innovation
items.body: Constantly improving tools and features to help you earn more.

cta.title: Ready to join the Bubld community?
cta.subtitle: Partner with us and start receiving local car wash jobs—no fees, no contracts, just fair pay and real opportunity.
